title: Static Connection
description: An inline data source: rows are embedded directly in config. It exists so the result-shape contract (E4-S3) can be exercised without a real backend; there is nothing to dial. rows is a list of objects whose keys are column names.

rows.description: Inline result rows. Each row is an object mapping column name to a JSON-scalar cell value.

columns.description: Optional explicit column ordering. When present, lists the column names in display order; rows may only use these names.
